clinical_history: This ECG from a 74-year-old woman shows which of the  following?
diagnosis: c)  Flutter waves are well-seen in V1 and lead III (at a  rate of about 280/min, with a ventricular response at about 70/min).   A classic right bundle branch block (RBBB ) pattern is also present. The patient has rheumatic mitral valve disease, moderate pulmonary hypertension, and  tricuspid regurgitation.
